hero.title: Find Any Moment
hero.subtitle: Search all your footage, pinpoint the exact clip in 10 seconds

import.dragOrClick: Drag files here, or click to select
import.supportedFormats: Supports MP4, MOV, MKV, MP3, WAV, M4A and more
import.successMessage: Imported {{count}} file(s). Go to Task Queue to start transcription
import.errorMessage: Import failed. Please check if Core service is running

onboarding.title: Get Started with EchoTrace
onboarding.subtitle: Complete 3 steps to search all your video content

step1.label: Download Transcription Model
step1.desc: Choose the small model (recommended). Ready to use after download

step2.label: Import Media Files
step2.desc: Supports MP4, MOV, MKV, MP3, WAV and more. Batch import available

step3.label: Start Transcribing & Searching
step3.desc: Create transcription tasks. Full-text search available after completion

resources.title: Resource Manager
resources.subtitle: Import local media files to prepare for transcription tasks.
resources.importError: Import failed. Please check if Core service is running.

empty.title: No Resources
empty.text: Click the import button to add your first file.

results.title: Transcription Results
results.subtitle: Search keywords and jump to the corresponding timeline.

searchResults.noMatchHint: Try a different keyword or adjust your filters.

delete.confirmMessage: Delete transcription for "{{filename}}"? This cannot be undone.
delete.batchConfirmMessage: Delete {{count}} selected transcription(s)? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No Transcription Results
empty.text: Results will appear here after transcription tasks complete.

taskQueue.title: Task Queue
taskQueue.subtitle: Create transcription tasks in batch and track their progress.
taskQueue.memWarning: Available memory {{available}} MB, this model needs ~{{required}} MB. Transcription may be slow or fail.

batch.title: Create Batch Tasks
batch.noFiles: No available files (all files already in queue)

notification.doneBody: {{name}} is done. Click to search its content.
notification.errorBody: {{name}} encountered an error. Click to retry.

empty.title: No Tasks
empty.text: Select files and create your first transcription task.

services.title: Services & Logs
services.subtitle: Manage local Core and Worker services, and view logs.

models.title: Models & Keys
models.subtitle: Configure MCP Provider model lists and API Keys.

privacy.cloudWarning: When using these services for AI analysis, your transcript text will be uploaded to third-party servers.
privacy.localWarning: Requires self-deployed Ollama or other local LLM services. Data stays on device, but performance and quality are limited.
privacy.importantNote: Only use cloud services for non-sensitive content
privacy.detailNote: Legal, medical, and confidential business content should avoid cloud AI analysis, or use local LLM only. Transcription always runs locally and is not affected.

models.noApiKeyNeeded: This Provider does not require an API Key.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Control playback, search, and other feature behaviors.

playback.title: Playback Settings
playback.autoPlayDesc: Start playing immediately after jumping to a timeline position
playback.loopSegmentDesc: Automatically replay when the segment ends

transcribe.title: Transcription Settings
transcribe.autoTranscribeDesc: Automatically create transcription jobs when media files are imported.

search.title: Search Settings
search.semanticDesc: Understands synonyms and related concepts for smarter search. Requires a local embedding model (auto-downloads on first use).
search.semanticUnavailable: Semantic search dependencies are not installed. Contact the developer or check the docs.
search.statusEnabled: Current: Semantic search enabled. Use hybrid retrieval on the AI Search page.
search.statusDisabled: Current: Full-text search mode (exact keyword matching).

aiSearch.title: Smart Search

fullTextMode.title: Currently using full-text search mode
fullTextMode.desc: Full-text search matches keywords precisely and works for most scenarios. To enable semantic search (understanding synonyms and related concepts), go to

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.clickToJump: Click a segment to jump to it. Current playback time: {{time}}

whisperModels.title: Whisper Models
whisperModels.subtitle: Manage local Whisper transcription model downloads.
whisperModels.info: Models are saved to your local cache and do not need to be re-downloaded. You can close this page during a download — progress continues in the background.
